case_title: KOZINSKY, PAVEL VS KRISTENSEN,CARSTEN D,& DBA"COPENHAGEN"FURNITURE ST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,995.00 FILED BY KOZINSKY, PAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT KRISTENSEN,CARSTEN D,& DBA"COPENHAGEN"FURNITURE ST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTFD. MAIL TO CARSTEN D. KRISTENSEN PRES./OWNER COPENHAGEN FURNITURE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOZINSKY, PAVEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KRISTENSEN,CARSTEN D,& DBA"COPENHAGEN"FURNITURE ST PLFT IS ORDERED TO SUBMIT THE SUBJECT FURNITURE TO DEFT'S MANUFACTURER FOR REPAIR PURSUANT TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
